name: Sarah McLachlan
description: '''Sarah Ann McLachlan''' (born January 28, 1968) is a Canadian singer-songwriter, ranked in the top echelon of Canadian musicians. As of 2025, she has sold over 40 million albums worldwide. McLachlan's best-selling album is ''[[Surfacing (album)|Surfacing]]'' (1997), for which she won two [[40th Annual Grammy Awards|Grammy Award]]s (out of four nominations) and four [[Juno Awards of 1998|Juno Award]]s. She has won three Grammy and twelve [[Juno Awards]] in total, and is a member of the [[Canadian Music Hall of Fame]] and the [[Canadian Songwriters Hall of Fame]].
